description: Brand contract for the Arjuna (Adsbranded) hero-media checkout family. Private family: source lives in the Adsbranded private template repo.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: DETERMINISTIC family default (baked, not optional): per-unit '/ea' current price + DIAGONAL compare strike + visible savings (SAVE % badge + Save amount). Applied in brand-theme.css to BOTH the bundle cards (.os-card__price.os--compare, .os-card__total-compare) and the cart-summary line items (.diagonal-strike) so it holds without per-card markup classes. Full-price is the explicit opt-DOWN, not a peer mode: a no-discount campaign hides the strike + savings via the SDK hasDiscount token, leaving only the current /ea + total. Bundle upsells keep a visible price row above the accept CTA.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Tiered .os-card cards with data-next-bundle-selector/-card anchors. Selected state (warm lime #F3FFDA fill + 3px solid #000 border + thick-ring radio) keys SOLELY on the SDK-swapped .next-selected class — never .next-in-cart and never a static data-selected attribute. Those are not cleared on swap, so keying on them leaves the previously selected card/radio lit and breaks single-select (issue #3; the card-fill variant of the bug was found + fixed during Layer-B browser verification). #F3FFDA/#000 is the Arjuna starter default — a built campaign must re-skin it to its brand.
family_inventory.order_bump: Single coverage bump (bump-coverage.html) using data-next-bump + data-next-package-toggle; quantity sync via data-next-product-sync (SDK >=0.4.25).
family_inventory.hero_media: DETERMINISTIC family default: a single large static product image (hero-media.html media_type=image, .banner-img). Carousel (media_type=gallery, swiper) and autoplay product video (media_type=video) are opt-in, NOT the baseline (3/4 surveyed Adsbranded checkouts are single-image). The checkout qaStructure hero selector accepts .banner-img-wrapper OR [data-component=swiper].
family_inventory.promo_display: Inline promo-code display (promo-display.html) is included by DEFAULT in the order-summary card — wired to the real SDK coupon path via data-next-coupon=input/display (+ os-checkout-field=coupon), frontmatter-driven label + optional suggested-code chip. Distinct from the optional exit-intent coupon (exit-intent-popup.html); this is the always-visible inline affordance and the applied voucher also shows in the cart-summary discount row.
family_inventory.typography: Tri-font signature — Inter (--font-primary: body+headings), Roboto (--font-secondary: cards/form/reviews), Poppins (--font-accent: delivery/scarcity). Driven entirely by --font-primary/-secondary/-accent tokens in brand-theme.css; NO family names are hardcoded in component CSS. Single-font collapse is a one-line override: :root{--font-primary:"X";--font-secondary:var(--font-primary);--font-accent:var(--font-primary)}.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Bundle stepper/tier-pills/tier-cards upsells require a visible price row above the accept CTA.
family_inventory.cro_variance: Arjuna-shaped checkouts get CRO revisions in the wild — added/swapped trust badges + security seals, an 'as seen in' press strip, a star-rating + review-count proof row by the heading, a rewritten or dropped guarantee, re-arranged optional blocks. The family ABSORBS these as frontmatter-driven OPTIONAL slots, never forks: trust-bar.html (trust_bar.seals / payment_logos / press), guarantee.html (guarantee.title / body / show:false), rating-stars.html (rating.stars / score / count), plus the already-driven hero / benefit_icons / testimonials / promo / delivery slots. MATCHER RULE: classify on the structural strongSignals (os-card bundle selector + .banner-img hero + left social-proof rail + inline promo + delivery block + .checkout-layout shell), NOT on the presence/absence of any specific badge, seal, rating, or press logo. Base Arjuna PLUS CRO badge/seal/rating/guarantee/rearrange additions is STILL arjuna — do not route it to a new family, and do not flag the optional CRO slots as residue or missing-requirement.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.

forbidden_computed_colors.token: --brand--color--primary (Arjuna starter default; per-campaign brand override missing)
--brand--color--surface (Arjuna starter default; per-campaign brand override missing)
